biological_replicate: For MAEs from JY cells, we always used 5 × 10^8 cells per sample.
technical_replicate: even LC-MS triplicates of one and the same sample provided only 64% overlap due to the stochastic nature of the applied data dependent acquisition (DDA) MS scheme.
experimental_design: We reasoned that some general features of identified MHC peptide ligandomes should be shared within MAE approaches and within MHC-IAC approaches.
factor_value: We used both the B lymphoblastoid cell line JY and the monocytic leukemia THP-1 cell line to carry out a direct comparison of MAE and MHC-IAC.
number_of_fractions: the fraction of peptides shared between MAE and MHC-IAC might not appear very high.
number_of_technical_replicates: even LC-MS triplicates of one and the same sample provided only 64% overlap.
number_of_biological_replicates: We performed five additional MAEs from JY cells and measured the samples with EThcD at the Orbitrap Fusion, yielding 3633, 4956, 4925, 5149, and 5064 peptides, respectively.
number_of_samples: We used both the B lymphoblastoid cell line JY and the monocytic leukemia THP-1 cell line to carry out a direct comparison of MAE and MHC-IAC.
